title: shabach #7623
definition:
1) to soothe, still, stroke
    1a) (Piel) to soothe, still
    1b) (Hiphil) stilling (participle)
 2) to laud, praise, commend
    2a) (Piel)
        2a1) to laud, praise (God)
        2a2) to commend, congratulate (the dead)
    2b) (Hithpael) to boast
